input.name: score
input.label: Score
input.help-text: Should contain from 1 to 5 stars emoji (e.g. ★★★★★)

input.name: content
input.label: Review
input.help-text: Review of the movie, that starts with short summary, followed by list of pros (start with +) and cons (start with -)

config.exclude: NumberedList Outdent Indent SpecialChar Anchor Table PasteModeSwitcher
